question: Chapters
feedback: Text does not list the main sections of the thesis. It only mentions that the work consists of 4 sections but does not provide a clear description or title for each section.

question: Description
feedback: Text briefly describes contents of each section, but it lacks detailed information about what specific topics will be covered in each section. It would be helpful to have a more comprehensive description of the content for each section.

question: Structure
feedback: Text provides a general structure of the thesis, but it does not clearly outline how the sections are connected and what is the logical flow of ideas. It would be helpful to have a more detailed explanation of how the sections relate to each other and how they contribute to the overall argument or research question.
